component.name: Vertree
component.summary: Desktop file version manager for backup, monitoring, and history review

description.p: Vertree is a desktop application for managing versions of standalone files without forcing them into a Git repository workflow.
It is designed for document-style files and local workflows where you want quick safety nets and visible history.

ul.li: Create manual or quick backups for important files.
Monitor selected files and keep snapshots over time.
Inspect version history with a visual tree view.
Use the built-in local API for automation and verification.
